blockingIssues.description: `AgentBridge.spawn()` threads `parentJid` through the shell stack but does not copy the inherited `effectiveModelId` onto the spawned `RegisteredScoop.config.modelId`, so the real `ScoopContext` path still falls back to `resolveCurrentModel()` when no explicit `--model` override is provided.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` with a validator note that local Swift `.build/` artifacts can cause `npx prettier --check .` to fail because Prettier does not honor the nested package `.gitignore` files; workers should clean those ignored directories before rerunning the lint gate.

Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to capture the `parentJid` bridge contract and the architectural requirement that inherited model selection must flow through `RegisteredScoop.config.modelId` for the real `ScoopContext` path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When command-layer behavior depends on `ctx.fs`, require either a real shell context or a mock shell context whose `stat`/`exists` delegate to VirtualFS. Today the skill calls out real `ScoopContext` coverage, but not FS-backed shell contexts for preflight validations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-agent-command-cwd-validation` had to retrofit `createMockShellCtx()` in `agent-integration.test.ts` and `agent-bridge-hook.test.ts` so command-layer cwd validation used real VFS-backed `stat`/`exists`, a gap not currently spelled out in the worker procedure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify, and align with `.factory/library/user-testing.md`, when live-browser/CDP verification is mandatory versus optional for pure headless utility-wrapper fixes. The current mission/library/skill wording leads workers to make contradictory completion claims.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `fix-bash-allowlist-hardening` cites conflicting instructions: mission.md says no browser UI testing required, the webapp-worker skill makes CDP checks optional for pure utility wrappers, while `.factory/library/user-testing.md` says workers and validators MUST perform live-browser validation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Tighten the skill to remind workers that skipped required real-path coverage or skipped manual verification must set `followedProcedure: false`.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented/enforcement: the current `webapp-worker` skill already requires real `ScoopContext` coverage for full-stack/model claims and already distinguishes required versus optional manual verification; the reviewed handoff mismatches reflect worker non-compliance more than a missing procedure.
